frozen_reason: v4 metacognitive turn — wiki synthesis layer frozen as background scheduler; this baseline measures a frozen surface. On-demand wisdom (compost ask) uses different synthesis path. See docs/metacognitive-direction.md.

regression_thresholds.rationale: loose initial thresholds — current 9/9 judgments hit ceiling (cov=100/faith=1.0/hall=0, stddev=0). Judge cannot discriminate degradation. Tighten only after fixture set hardened.

saturation_flag.evidence: coverage_pct stddev=0 and faithfulness stddev=0 across 9 judgments, while wiki_chars varied (compost-architecture 688-754, quotaflow-purpose 498-515). LLM synthesis is stochastic; judge scores are not. Indicates the judge prompt is not sensitive to actual quality variation in this fixture set.
remediation_options: expand fixtures from 3 to 8-10 with harder seeds (incomplete fact sets, contradictory facts, edge cases)
switch judge model to a different family (e.g. qwen3.5:35b) to break self-bias from gemma4:31b judging gemma4:31b synthesis
add explicit hard-judge prompt variants (e.g. require judge to find at least 1 hallucination; reject judges that return 0 every time)
track wiki_chars distribution as a proxy signal — the only currently-discriminating field

notes: Initial baseline 2026-05-01. Establishes infrastructure works. Use as regression gate floor only — passing this gate does NOT prove quality. Re-establish after fixture hardening.
